Send beta onboarding email sequence to studio owner (superadmin only).

Fires the beta.welcome notification event to the studio owner.
The getting_started and feedback_reminder events are intended to be
triggered by pg_cron on a delay (day 1 and day 7), but can also
be manually triggered by calling this endpoint with the respective
event_type query param in a future iteration.

post.description: Initiate COPPA VPC: create a Stripe Setup Intent and a pending consent record.
Submit a signed consent form (escape hatch for parents without cards).
Revoke a verified COPPA consent. Pauses data collection, schedules 30-day auto-delete.

get.description: Get the current COPPA consent status for a child in a studio.

schema.title: Response Get Coppa Consent Coppa Consent Get

post.description:
Handle Stripe setup_intent.succeeded webhook for COPPA VPC.

Verifies signature, checks idempotency, then confirms the consent.
Parent initiates child data deletion. Returns pending request.
Confirm deletion via email token. Schedules 15-day grace period.

post.description: Cancel a pending or scheduled deletion. Available any time before T-0.

Return the Account Access Log for the authenticated user.
